summary: Comprehensive testing of ZET Mindshare document editor. Backend: 22/22 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All 25 requested features tested and verified working (100%).
passed_tests: Backend: Root endpoint returns API info
Backend: Auth with valid session returns user data
Backend: Auth rejects invalid/missing sessions (401)
Backend: Bearer token authentication works
Backend: Documents CRUD (list, get, create, update, delete)
Backend: Document pages update for auto-save
Backend: Notes CRUD operations
Backend: ZETA AI chat endpoint responds with session management
Backend: Cloud storage mocked endpoints working
Frontend: Login page loads with Google Auth button
Frontend: Editor page loads with 3-column layout (toolbox, canvas, right panel)
Frontend: Text tool creates editable contentEditable text elements
Frontend: Enter key creates new line in text elements
Frontend: Click elsewhere commits text
Frontend: Character count updates correctly in right panel
Frontend: Triangle/Square/Circle/Star shape tools add shapes
Frontend: Draw tool opens draggable panel with brush size, opacity, color
Frontend: Color tool opens draggable panel with preset colors and custom picker
Frontend: Text Size tool opens draggable panel with slider and number input
Frontend: Font tool opens draggable panel with font list and search
Frontend: Page Size tool opens draggable panel with A4/A5/Letter/Legal/Square and custom
Frontend: AI Image tool opens draggable panel with prompt and quality selector
Frontend: Add Page creates new page visible in right panel
Frontend: Undo/Redo buttons toggle enabled/disabled based on history
Frontend: Save button triggers document save API call
Frontend: Toolbox search filters tools correctly
Frontend: Toolbox collapse/expand toggle works
Frontend: ZETA AI chat input and send button functional
Frontend: Pages panel shows thumbnails with click-to-navigate
Frontend: Image upload modal opens with Choose File button
Frontend: Voice tool shows bottom bar with play/pause/skip controls
Frontend: Cut tool removes clicked element from canvas
Frontend: Hand tool available for selecting and dragging
Frontend: Mass Select tool available for lasso selection
Frontend: Home button navigates back to dashboard
Frontend: Document title is editable in header
critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is good - modular component architecture properly implemented
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
API endpoints properly exclude MongoDB _id fields
seed_data_creation: Pre-existing test user and document in MongoDB
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 25 features from the requirements are working correctly. Backend API is fully functional with 22 tests covering auth, documents CRUD, notes CRUD, ZETA AI chat, and mocked cloud storage. Frontend editor has working tools: text (contentEditable WYSIWYG), shapes (triangle/square/circle/star), draw, color picker, text size, font selector, page size, AI image generation, add page, voice reader, cut, hand (select/drag), mass select, undo/redo, save, and toolbox with search and collapse/expand. All draggable panels working. ZETA AI chat functional. Dark theme with #292f91 and #4ca8ad colors applied.
rca_of_the_issue: No issues found - all features working as expected
